content:
## Issue #27 closed — PR #30 merged (2026-04-03)

chunzhe10/dorea#27 "perf(dorea-gpu): pre-allocate CudaGrader device buffers" resolved by PR #30.

Result: 7.3% wall-clock improvement (8m3s vs 8m41s on 4K footage). GPU SM utilization unchanged at 7-16% — bottleneck remains PCIe bandwidth, not cudaMalloc overhead. The cudarc 0.12.1 pool-based cudaMallocAsync allocation path is faster than anticipated from the prior design estimate.
